audio_analysis.lyrics_text: The night gently falls. The light is what we saw. But when it rains, it washes away the pain. Then it drains into the ocean. And the day is all we could say. As you cry, remember why. Lights in the sky blowing our minds. Teleport to another dimension. Mission abort, beyond religion. Yet within. The day is all we could say.
audio_analysis.song_description: A nostalgic indie pop track featuring atmospheric synths and emotive vocals reflecting on fleeting memories.
audio_analysis.video_idea: A young man wanders through a neon-lit city at night in the pouring rain. The puddles vividly reflect surreal, distorted memories of his past, capturing a melancholic and deeply reflective atmosphere.
